subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! Upon thee be the everlasting glory of God! Verily, We have remembered thee time and again, and have announced unto thee the glad-tidings of that which thou hast attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی علیک بهاء الله الابدی انا ذکرناک مره بعد مره و بشرناک بما فاز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
